svg.title: Bayazid HS-02 Architecture — Process Flow
svg.desc: A flowchart showing how user input flows through the classifier, FastAPI router, AI engine, and back to the browser as a streaming response.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the chat input work in Bayazid HS-02?')
sendPrompt('How does the Bayazid classifier work?')
sendPrompt('How does the FastAPI router route intents in Bayazid?')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about Bayazid chat mode')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about Bayazid teach mode')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about Bayazid quiz mode')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about Bayazid code review mode')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about Bayazid timer mode')
sendPrompt('How does conversation memory work in Bayazid HS-02?')
sendPrompt('How does the study timer work in Bayazid HS-02?')
sendPrompt('How does the RAG book knowledge system work in Bayazid?')
sendPrompt('How does Bayazid build prompts before sending to the model?')
sendPrompt('Which Ollama models does Bayazid HS-02 use?')
sendPrompt('How does the Bayazid chat frontend render streamed responses?')
